arts.ttl: Adzic: Juventus’ rising star ready to shine under Motta’s guidance
arts.sum: Vasilije Adzic, the 18-year-old Montenegrin attacker who joined Juventus this summer from Budućnost, is poised to make his mark on the first team. Despite facing early setbacks due to muscular injuries, Adzic is now ready to showcase the potential that prompted the Bianconeri to invest in him. Calciomercato report how Thiago Motta, Juventus’ manager, has expressed high hopes for the young talent. “You’ve seen little of him,” Motta stated, “but he’s a strong player.” The coach has been particularly impressed by Adzic’s posture on the field, noting that he appears more “open” and in tune with the team’s tactical requirements. The post Adzic: Juventus’ rising star ready to shine under Motta’s guidance appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Agent Antonio Caliendo: ‘Patience is needed to see the best of Douglas Luiz’
arts.sum: Antonio Caliendo, the renowned agent who has represented football icons like Roberto Baggio and David Trezeguet, recently shared his thoughts on Juventus’ current situation and players in an interview with Calciomercato.it. Addressing Douglas Luiz’s struggle to meet expectations, Caliendo said, “In Italy, we’re used to wanting immediate maximum results from any champion brought from abroad. However, there have been many great champions who struggled in the first 5-6 months because they needed to adapt and embrace the mentality of a new technical situation. South American habits completely change with European ones. We just need patience, but in the end, he The post Agent Antonio Caliendo: ‘Patience is needed to see the best of Douglas Luiz’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.
